data.title: Create ticket_reducer/llm_format.py with to_llm() and update __init__.py re-export
data.description: Create plugins/dso/scripts/ticket_reducer/llm_format.py by moving the to_llm(), shorten_comment(), shorten_dep() functions from plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-llm-format.py into the new module. No behavioral changes. Update plugins/dso/scripts/ticket_reducer/__init__.py to re-export to_llm. Keep ticket-llm-format.py as a thin shim that imports from ticket_reducer.llm_format (backward compat — do NOT delete until grep audit confirms no additional callers). testing_mode: GREEN (783f-48fa covers behavior).
